title: Actor document fetch has no body size limit
description:
actor_cache.rs line 62 and server.rs Follow handler line 621 both call .json::<serde_json::Value>() on the actor document response with no body size cap. A malicious remote server can stream an unbounded response body, exhausting process memory.

The media fetch path (media.rs) correctly caps at 10MB via Content-Length check and bytes() streaming check. The same pattern needs to be applied here.

Fix: call .bytes_limited(MAX_ACTOR_DOC_SIZE) (or equivalent) before .json() deserialization, or use a response size cap middleware. A reasonable limit is 64KB — actor documents have no legitimate reason to exceed that.
close_reason: Actor doc body capped at 64KB in both actor_cache and Follow handler
